Metadata.SourceFile: Sorcerer of Claymorgue Castle, The (Adventure International).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x199E "THESORCEREROFCLAYMORGUECASTLE-199E" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Sorcerer of Claymorgue Castle, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
